## 基本信息
- **包名**: com.jmix.tool.modelgentest
- **模型名称**: Hello2
- **变量模型描述**: @ParaAnno(

)
private ParaVar colorVar;

    options = {"Small", "Medium", "Big"}
)

## 核心要求
你是一名产品配置器建模方面的专家机器人，请根据用户的规则伪代码和变量建模生成Ortools SAT表示约束代码及对应的测试代码。

## 一、约束的变量建模元信息

### ParaVar类（参数变量）
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
public class ParaVar { 
    public String code;                    // 参数的code，如:color
    public AlgCPIntVar value;                   // 参数的值，对应一个约束的变量，代表当前选择的值（可选值的codeId，如10）
    public AlgCPBoolVar isHidden;               // 本参数是否隐藏（1-表示隐藏，0表示显示），对应约束的一个变量
    public Map&lt;Integer, ParaOptionVar&gt; optionSelectVars = new HashMap&lt;&gt;(); // 本参数每个可选择值选中状态
    public ParaOptionVar getParaOptionByCode(String code){...}
}
&#96;&#96;&#96;

### ParaOptionVar类（参数选项变量）
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
public class ParaOptionVar {
    public Integer codeId;                 // 参数可选值的codeId，整数，如:10 
    public String code;                    // 参数可选值的Code，如:Red
    public AlgCPBoolVar isSelectedVar;          // 对应一个约束的变量，表示是否选中
}
&#96;&#96;&#96;

### PartVar类（部件变量）
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
public class PartVar { 
    public String code;                    // Part的Code，如:part1
    public AlgCPIntVar qty;                     // 部件的数量值quantity，对应一个约束的变量
    public AlgCPBoolVar isHidden;                // 对应一个约束的变量，本Part是否隐藏（1-表示隐藏，0表示显示）
    public AlgCPBoolVar isSelected;          // 对应一个约束的变量，表示是否选中}
public class PartCategoryVar { 
    public String code;                    // Part的Code，如:part1
    public Map&lt;String,PartVar&gt; partMap;   
    public Map&lt;String,PartCategoryVar&gt; partCategoryMap;    
}


&#96;&#96;&#96;

## 二、约束代码要求

### 1. 基类依赖
- 仅使用Ortool-java的9.12.4544版本的API，不要使用老版本的API
- 如果生成不出来，就输出生成不出来，不要瞎输出
- 约束代码依赖的基类已经定义了CPModel信息和变量信息和调用rule方法的代码, 不需要生成initConstraint方法的代码
- 不需要生成基类，仅需要生成每个rule对应的约束代码
- 每个rule生成一个方法，并使用@CodeRuleAnno注解，注解中需要生成normalNaturalCode
--在基类会统一创建公用的变量，例如:colorVar, 每个rule方法不需要创建变量，例如:model().newInt*等
--rule方法里关键步骤都要生成注释，方便理解
--如果约束代码里使用了isHidden,则该变量需要调用addVarAboutHiddenConstraints(在“约束关联的变量设置地方”)
-----例如： 有约束 P1.isHidden = P2.isHidden,则需要增加： addVarAboutHiddenConstraints(P1,P2);
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
class ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
    protected CpModel model; 
    protected Module module;
    protected void initConstraint() {
        //调用rule方法的代码
    }

    protected void initVariables() {
        // 变量初始化代码
        // 约束关联的变量设置地方
        
    } 
    
    void createParaVar() {
        // 参数value和optionSelectVars的关系
        paraVar.optionSelectVars.forEach((optionId, optionVar) -&gt; {
            model().addEquality( paraVar.value, optionId).onlyEnforceIf(optionVar.getIsSelectedVar());
            model().addDifferent( paraVar.value, optionId).onlyEnforceIf(optionVar.getIsSelectedVar().not());
        });
    }
}
&#96;&#96;&#96;

### 2. 技术规范
- 使用Ortool-java的9.12.4544版本
- 不要使用老版本的API
--代码注释尽量使用英文
- 保证编译能通过
### 3.常见使用生成约束代码的案例：
3.1.a  逻辑代码： Part1.quantity = P1.value + P2.value
3.1.b  约束代码为： model().addEquality(Part1.qty, LinearExpr.sum(new AlgCPIntVar[]{P1.value, P2.value}));


## 三、测试代码生成要求

### 1. 基本要求
- **优先处理用户测试用例特殊规格**：如果  非空，则优先按照用户指定的规格生成测试用例
- **逻辑完备性测试**：在用户指定用例的基础上，根据约束逻辑的完备性补充生成必要的测试用例
- 用例要求简洁、完备，需要包括代码逻辑的覆盖
- 用户制定的用例一定要实现
- 基于Junit4实现
- 用例代码继承ModuleScenarioTestBase（测试框架）
- 每个用例需要给出相应注释，解释这个注释是测试那个rule的,
--代码注释尽量使用英文

### 2. 测试方法实现
每个测试用例基于下列的流比较方法实现：

#### 2.1 参数推理方法
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
// 根据输入的Part的数量，运行约束求解来求解推理的参数
inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty) -&gt; 解的结果

// 根据输入的Part的数量和预定义参数，运行约束求解来求解推理的参数
// 支持同时指定部件和预定义参数，实现更精确的推理
inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty, String paraCode1, String value1, String paraCode2, String value2, ...) -&gt; 解的结果

// 根据输入的Para的值，运行约束求解来求解推理的参数
// 支持单个参数或多个参数
inferParasByPara(String paraCode, String value) -&gt; 解的结果
inferParasByPara(String paraCode1, String value1, String paraCode2, String value2, ...) -&gt; 解的结果

// 根据约束，推理推荐解
inferRecommend(String partCode,String partCategory, String constraintReq1,....)

#### 2.1.1 典型调用案例
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
// 案例1：仅指定部件数量进行推理
inferParas("tShirt1", 2);  // 推理TShirt1数量为2时的所有参数组合

// 案例2：指定部件数量+预定义参数进行推理
inferParas("tShirt1", 2, "color", "Red");  // 推理TShirt1数量为2且颜色为红色时的参数组合
inferParas("tShirt1", 2, "color", "Red", "size", "L");  // 推理TShirt1数量为2且颜色为红色、尺寸为L时的参数组合

// 案例3：仅指定参数值进行推理
inferParasByPara("color", "Red");  // 推理颜色为红色时的所有部件和参数组合
inferParasByPara("color", "Red", "size", "L");  // 推理颜色为红色且尺寸为L时的所有组合

// 案例4：复杂场景推理
inferParas("tShirt1", 1, "color", "Red", "size", "L", "Style", "Casual");  // 推理特定配置的完整参数组合

// 案例5：推理推荐解
inferRecommend("drive", "sum.Quantity ==2 where Speed=540");   
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 2.2 结果断言方法
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
// 判断结果是正确还是失败，没有解
resultAssert().assertSuccess() | assertFailure() | assertNoSolution()

// 判断推理结果有几组解
resultAssert().assertSolutionSizeEqual(int expectedSolutionsize)
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 2.3 解验证方法
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
// 第一个解(index=0)
solutions(0)
    .assertPara("P1").valueEqual("op11")        // 第一个解的参数P1的值是否等于"op11"
    .assertPart("Part1").quantityEqual(1);      // 第一个解的部件Part1的数量是否等于1
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 2.4 解数量验证方法
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
// conditionExpr="ParaVar.code:ParaVar.value,PartVar.code:PartVar.value"
void assertSolutionNum(String conditionExpr, int expectSolutionNum)

// 示例：检查执行推理结果中满足(P1.value=op11 且 P2.value=op21)的个数是否等于0
assertSolutionNum("P1:op11,P2:op21", 0);
&#96;&#96;&#96;

## 四、输出代码要求

### 1. 技术规范
- 使用Java语言
- 使用Ortool的9.12.4544版本,不要使用老版本的API
- 输出需要包含依赖Ortool的包，例如：&#96;import com.google.ortools.sat.*;&#96;
- 仅输出生成的Java代码，前后不要包含注解 &#96;&#96;&#96;java、&#96;&#96;&#96;
- 如果输入了多份PackageName和ModelName，则需要生成多份独立Java代码,不要放到一起

### 2. 代码模板
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
package com.jmix.tool.modelgentest;

import com.jmix.coretest.*; 
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.*;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.var.*;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.*;
import com.google.ortools.sat.*; 
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j; 
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

@Slf4j
public class Hello2Test extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {
    
    //---------------模型的定义start----------------------------------------
    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
    @AlgorithmApiVersion(southApiVersion = "1.0", algorithmVersion = "generated")
    static public class Hello2Constraint extends ModuleAlgBase {
        @ParaAnno( 
    options = {"Red", "Black", "White"}
)
private ParaVar colorVar;

@ParaAnno( 
    options = {"Small", "Medium", "Big"}
)
private ParaVar sizeVar;

@PartAnno()
private PartVar tShirt11Var;
        
        // 每个rule一个rule方法
    }
    //---------------模型的定义end----------------------------------------

    public Hello2Test() {
        super(Hello2Constraint.class);
    }

    
}
&#96;&#96;&#96;

## 五、案例示例 

### 案例1：T恤衫配置
#### 输入1：包名packageName
&#96;&#96;&#96;
com.jmix.scenario
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 输入2：模型名称modelName
&#96;&#96;&#96;
HelloSample
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 输入3：用户变量建模userVariableModel
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
@ParaAnno( 
    options = {"Red", "Black", "White"}
)
private ParaVar colorVar;

@ParaAnno( 
    options = {"Small", "Medium", "Big"}
)
private ParaVar sizeVar;

@PartAnno()
private PartVar tShirt11Var;
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 输入4：用户逻辑伪代码userLogicByPseudocode
&#96;&#96;&#96;java

//rule1:
if(colorVar.value == Red &amp;&amp; sizeVar.value == Small) {
    tShirt11Var.qty = 1;
}
else {
    tShirt11Var.qty = 3;
}

//rule2: 
   colorVar.isHidden and sizeVar.isHidden 是兼容的
   
&#96;&#96;&#96;

#### 输出：完整的测试代码
&#96;&#96;&#96;java
package com.jmix.scenario

import com.jmix.coretest.*; 
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.*;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.var.*;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.*;
import com.google.ortools.sat.*; 
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j; 
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * Hello模块约束算法测试
 *
 * @since 2025-09-23
 */
@Slf4j
public class HelloSampleTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {    
    public HelloSampleTest() {
        super(HelloSampleConstraint.class);
    }

    //---------------cpmodel start----------------------------------
    /**
     * HelloSample的约束模型类
     * 
     * @since 2025-09-23
     */
    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
    @AlgorithmApiVersion(southApiVersion = "1.0", algorithmVersion = "generated")
    static public class HelloSampleConstraint extends ModuleAlgBase {
        @ParaAnno(
                options = {"Red", "Black", "White"}
        )
        private ParaVar colorVar;

        @ParaAnno(
                options = {"Small", "Medium", "Big"}
        )
        private ParaVar sizeVar;
        
        @PartAnno()
        private PartVar tShirt11Var;

        //rule1
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "if(colorVar.value == Red &amp;&amp; sizeVar.value == Small) {\n tShirt11Var.qty = 1;\n  } else {\n tShirt11Var.qty = 3; }")
        private void rule1() {
            // 创建条件变量：颜色是红色且尺寸是小号
            AlgCPBoolVar redAndSmall = model().newBoolVar("rule2_redAndSmall");

            // 实现条件逻辑：redAndSmall = (color == Red) AND (size == Small)
            model().addBoolAnd(new AlgCPLiteral[]{
                    this.colorVar.getParaOptionByCode("Red").getIsSelectedVar(),
                    this.sizeVar.getParaOptionByCode("Small").getIsSelectedVar()
            }).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall);

            // 如果不是红色且小号的组合，则redAndSmall为false
            model().addBoolOr(new AlgCPLiteral[]{
                    this.colorVar.getParaOptionByCode("Red").getIsSelectedVar().not(),
                    this.sizeVar.getParaOptionByCode("Small").getIsSelectedVar().not()
            }).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall.not());

            // 根据条件设置tShirt11的数量
            // 如果redAndSmall为true，则tShirt11数量为1
            model().addEquality(this.tShirt11Var.value, 1).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall);

            // 如果redAndSmall为false，则tShirt11数量为3
            model().addEquality(this.tShirt11Var.value, 3).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall.not());
        }

        //rule2:
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "colorVar.isHidden and sizeVar.isHidden 是兼容的)
        private void rule2() {
            addVarAboutHiddenConstraints(colorVar, sizeVar);
            model().addEquality(colorVar.isHidden,sizeVar.isHidden));
        }
    }
    //-------------- cpmodel end----------------------------------------

    @Test
    public void testIfCondition() {
        // 测试颜色参数推理
        inferParas("tShirt11", 1);

        // 使用resultAssert验证执行结果
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(1);

        // 验证第一个解
        solutions(0).assertPara("color").valueEqual("Red")
                .assertPara("size").valueEqual("Small");
        printSolutions();
    }

    @Test
    public void testMultipleParaInference() {
        // 测试多个参数同时推理
        inferParasByPara("color", "Red", "size", "Small");
        
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(1);
        
        solutions(0).assertPart("tShirt11").quantityEqual(1);
        printSolutions();
    }

    @Test
    public void testElseCondition() {
        inferParas("tShirt11", 3);
        printSolutions();
        // 反推有8个解  8=3*3 - 1
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(8);
        // if的解肯定不在其中
        assertSolutionNum("color:Red,size:Small", 0);
        // else的解可能解如下：
        assertSolutionNum("color:Black,size:Big", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:White,size:Medium", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:Red,size:Medium", 1); 
        printSolutions();
    }

    @Test
    public void testNoneOfIfElse() {
        // if/else都没有选择
        // 测试颜色参数推理
        inferParas("tShirt11", 10);
        // 使用resultAssert验证执行结果
        resultAssert().assertNoSolution();
        printSolutions();
    }
}
&#96;&#96;&#96;

## 六、注意事项

1. **日志规范**: 所有日志内容必须使用英文，符合项目规范
2. **代码质量**: 生成的代码应该简洁、清晰、可读性好
3. **测试覆盖**: 测试用例需要覆盖所有逻辑分支，包括多参数推理场景
4. **错误处理**: 包含适当的异常处理和边界条件测试
5. **性能考虑**: 约束求解应该高效，避免不必要的复杂性
6. **输出格式**: 直接输出纯Java代码，不要包含任何Markdown标记
7. **多参数推理**: 优先使用多参数版本的inferParasByPara方法，提高测试效率

- 不要包含任何Markdown格式
- 不要包含代码说明或解释
- 只返回可以直接编译的Java代码

Both are available today on Hugging Face with open weights, through the DeepSeek API, and via chat.deepseek.com.\n[...]\nDeepSeek V4 is the fourth generation flagship model family from DeepSeek, the Hangzhou based AI lab that rocked global markets in January 2025 with the low-cost R1 reasoning model. V4 replaces DeepSeek V3 and V3.2, which are being retired after July 24, 2026.\n[...]\nBoth V4 models are open source, published under the DeepSeek collection on Hugging Face. Developers can download the weights, run them locally, and fine-tune them. The API is live today at api-docs.deepseek.com, and supports both the OpenAI ChatCompletions and Anthropic API formats.\n[...]\nTraining Tokens |\n|\n[...]\n--- |\n|\n[...]\n| 2\n[...]\n| 2\n[...]\n| 3\n[...]\n|\n| DeepSeek\n[...]\nDeepSeek V4 is available through the DeepSeek API starting April 24, 2026. API users do not need to change their&#96;base_url&#96;, only the&#96;model&#96; parameter:\n[...]\n- &#96;deepseek-v4-pro&#96; for V4-Pro\n- &#96;deepseek-v4-flash&#96; for V4-Flash\n[...]\nThinking modes, configured\n[...]\nDeepSeek has not published final public API prices alongside the preview release. The existing&#96;deepseek-chat&#96; and&#96;deepseek-reasoner&#96; endpoints continue to serve V4-Flash in Non-Thinking and Thinking modes respectively, and will be fully retired after July 24, 2026, 15:59 UTC. Developers should migrate to the explicit&#96;deepseek-v4-pro&#96; and&#96;deepseek-v4-flash&#96; model IDs before that date.\n[...]\nDeepSeek API. Available via&#96;deepseek-v4-pro&#96; and&#96;deepseek-v4-flash&#96;. Both models default to 1M context. Thinking and Non-Thinking modes are selectable per request.\u003c/content\u003e\n\u003c/result\u003e\n\n\u003cresult id=\"4\"\u003e\n\u003ctitle\u003eThe Complete Guide to DeepSeek Models: V3, R1, V4 and Beyond\u003c/title\u003e\n\u003curl\u003ehttps://www.bentoml.com/blog/the-complete-guide-to-deepseek-models-from-v3-to-r1-and-beyond\u003c/url\u003e\n\u003ccontent\u003e## DeepSeek-V3#\n[...]\n## DeepSeek-\n[...]\n24#\n[...]\n, the post\n[...]\ndrawing lessons from the\n[...]\ntechnique in DeepSeek\n[...]\nevaluations, DeepSeek-V3\n[...]\n## DeepSeek-V4#\n[...]\nIn April 2026, DeepSeek introduced DeepSeek-V4, with a significant architectural leap to make ultra-long context usable in production.\n[...]\nThe series includes two MoE models:\n[...]\n- DeepSeek-V4-Pro: 1.6T total parameters, 49B activated per token\n- DeepSeek-V4-Flash: 284B total parameters, 13B activated per token\n[...]\nmodels are trained on\n[...]\ntokens and natively\n[...]\ntoken context, DeepSeek-V\n[...]\n-Pro uses only\n[...]\n27% of the inference FLOPs and 10% of the KV cache compared to DeepSeek-V3.\n[...]\nSeek-V\n[...]\n% of the\n[...]\nOPs and 7% of the KV cache\n[...]\nSeek-V\n[...]\nof the first open-\n[...]\n### DeepSeek-V4-Pro vs. DeepSeek-V4-Flash#\n[...]\n| Item | DeepSeek-V4-Pro | DeepSeek-V4-Flash |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| Total parameters | 1.6T | 284B |\n| Activated per token | 49B | 13B |\n| Context length | 1M tokens | 1M tokens |\n| Reasoning modes | Non-think / Think High / Think\n[...]\n| Non-think / Think\n[...]\nknowledge | Significantly stronger |\n[...]\nably weaker at smaller scale\n[...]\nmode) |\n[...]\nopen-source results across coding, math, agent tasks | Comparable to Pro on reasoning when given larger thinking budget |\n[...]\n| Agent tasks | Stronger, especially on complex multi-step workflows | Matches Pro on some benchmarks; trails on hardest tasks |\n[...]\n| License | MIT | MIT |\n[...]\n| Best for | Highest-capability open-source tasks: research, coding agents, factual Q\u0026A | Cost-efficient inference with strong reasoning; good everyday alternative to Pro |\n[...]\nNow that you’re familiar with the DeepSeek models, you may be thinking about building your own AI applications with them. At first glance, calling the official DeepSeek API might seem like the easiest solution; it offers fast time to market with no infrastructure burden.\u003c/content\u003e\n\u003c/result\u003e\n\n\u003cresult id=\"5\"\u003e\n\u003ctitle\u003eModels \u0026 Pricing | DeepSeek API Docs\u003c/title\u003e\n\u003curl\u003ehttps://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing\u003c/url\u003e\n\u003ccontent\u003eModels \u0026 Pricing | DeepSeek API Docs\n\nOn this page\n\n# Models \u0026 Pricing\n\nThe prices listed below are in units of per 1M tokens. A token, the smallest unit of text that the model recognizes, can be a word, a number, or even a punctuation mark. We will bill based on the total number of input and output tokens by the model.\n\n---\n\n## Model Details​\n\n| MODEL | deepseek-v4-flash(1) | deepseek-v4-pro |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| BASE URL (OpenAI Format) | https://api.deepseek.com |\n| BASE URL (Anthropic Format) | https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic |\n| MODEL VERSION | DeepSeek-V4-Flash | DeepSeek-V4-Pro |\n| THINKING MODE | Supports both non-thinking and thinking (default) modesSee Thinking Mode for how to switch |\n| CONTEXT LENGTH | 1M |\n| MAX OUTPUT | MAXIMUM: 384K |\n| FEATURES | Json Output | ✓ | ✓ |\n| Tool Calls | ✓ | ✓ |\n| Chat Prefix Completion（Beta） | ✓ | ✓ |\n| FIM Completion（Beta） | Non-thinking mode only | Non-thinking mode only |\n| PRICING | 1M INPUT TOKENS (CACHE HIT) | $0.0028 | $0.003625 |\n| 1M INPUT TOKENS (CACHE MISS) | $0.14 | $0.435 |\n| 1M OUTPUT TOKENS | $0.28 | $0.87 |\n| Concurrency Limit(2) | 2500 | 500 |\n\n(1) The model names&#96;deepseek-chat&#96; and&#96;deepseek-reasoner&#96; will be deprecated on 2026/07/24 15:59 UTC. For compatibility, they correspond to the non-thinking mode and thinking mode of&#96;deepseek-v4-flash&#96;, respectively. (2) For more details on concurrency limits, please refer to Rate Limit \u0026 Isolation\n\n---\n\n## Deduction Rules​\n\nThe expense = number of tokens × price. The corresponding fees will be directly deducted from your topped-up balance or granted balance, with a preference for using the granted balance first when both balances are available.\n\nProduct prices may vary and DeepSeek reserves the right to adjust them.
